calendar.matters:
Petition Of Tara Lee Ford, Trustte Of The Stepehen J. Parr Living Trust Dtd 3/29/16 For 1.Order Confirming Trust Assets & Transferring Assets Into Tru
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Petition Of Tara Lee Ford, Trustte Of The Stepehen J. Parr Living Trust Dtd 3/29/16 For 1.Order Confirming Trust Assets & Transferring Assets Into Tru
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Continued To Jun-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Freedman for and Tara Ford.

The Court stated that it is okay with the 850 petition, except with regard to the IRA accounts, and that it does not know how an IRA that can't be a Trust, could be put into a Trust. Mr. Freedman stated that it is not an employer IRA, that the Decedent ran a business as a dba, that he probably did this for tax purposes, that you can fund a Trust with an individual account, not with an employee pension plan, and that the only disadvantage would be a penalty. Mr. Freedman also stated that it is titled to himself (Trustor) as a Trustee and he found no authority that it could not be funded as a Trust. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets, etc. is continued to June 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide a legal brief that sets out his argument and authority for an IRA account to be held by a Trustee in the name of a Trust. Said brief is to be submitted by June 27, 2018. The matter will be deemed under submission on that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
